## Version Impact

Check **exactly one** box (CI enforces a single selection — like a radio button):

- [ ] **patch** — backward-compatible bug fix (`x.y.Z+1`)
- [ ] **minor** — new backward-compatible feature (`x.Y+1.0`)
- [ ] **major** — breaking change (`X+1.0.0`; requires `version:major-approved` label from git guardian)
- [ ] **none** — docs / CI / markdown only (no release)
